channel.title: Enterprise on ❯ DineshKumar's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise on ❯ DineshKumar's Blog

item.title: The Road Ahead: Neuro-Symbolic AI for Enterprise Reasoning Systems
item.description:
We just saved $2M/year and nobody noticed

You deployed a neuro-symbolic system that routes financial transactions through a rule engine before LLM approval. It caught 500 compliance violations that an LLM-only system would have missed.

item.title: GenAI in the Enterprise SaaS Ecosystem: A Staff Engineer's Integration Playbook
item.description:
You built a brilliant GenAI feature and now finance is asking why your infrastructure costs tripled

You added an “AI co-pilot” to your SaaS product. Customers loved it. Usage exploded. Token costs scaled linearly with usage. Your margins inverted.
